# Water Serpent Plumbing

> Owner-operated blocked-drain and plumbing specialist serving Melbourne's outer east, the Dandenong Ranges and the Yarra Valley. Same-day service, 24/7 emergencies. You speak to the owner, Jack — never a call centre. Call 0425 226 636.

Water Serpent Plumbing is a Victorian-registered (BPC) plumbing business based in Kalorama, VIC, specialising in blocked drains. Core work includes drain unblocking, CCTV drain-camera inspections, 5000 PSI hydro jetting (also called jet blasting), and no-dig pipe relining. Owner Jack has 20+ years' experience and the business holds a 5.0-star rating across 85+ Google reviews. We are a service-area business (no walk-in storefront) covering 45+ suburbs.

## Services

- [Blocked Drains](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-drains.html): Same-day blocked drain clearing across Melbourne's outer east.
- [Blocked Drain Cost Guide](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-drain-cost-melbourne.html): Honest, upfront pricing for clearing a blocked drain in Melbourne.
- [CCTV Drain Inspection](https://waterserpent.com.au/cctv-drain-inspection.html): Drain-camera inspections to pinpoint blockages, cracks and tree-root intrusion.
- [Hydro Jet Drain Cleaning & Jet Blasting](https://waterserpent.com.au/hydro-jet-drain-cleaning.html): 5000 PSI water jetting to clear and scour pipes.
- [Pipe Relining](https://waterserpent.com.au/pipe-relining.html): No-dig repair of cracked or broken pipes.
- [Blocked Toilets](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-toilets.html): Same-day blocked-toilet clearing.
- [Blocked Sinks](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-sinks.html): Clearing slow and blocked kitchen and laundry sinks.
- [Blocked Showers](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-shower.html): Clearing blocked shower and floor drains.
- [Blocked Basins](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-basin.html): Clearing blocked bathroom basins.
- [Blocked Stormwater Drains](https://waterserpent.com.au/stormwater-drains.html): Clearing blocked stormwater drains and downpipes, a common Melbourne winter problem.
- [Blocked Septic Systems](https://waterserpent.com.au/blocked-septics.html): Septic and on-site wastewater drain clearing.
- [Emergency Plumber](https://waterserpent.com.au/emergency-plumber.html): 24/7 emergency drain and plumbing call-outs.
- [Pipe Locating](https://waterserpent.com.au/pipe-locating.html): Locating underground pipes and drains before digging.
- [Drain Smoke Testing](https://waterserpent.com.au/drain-smoke-testing.html): Smoke testing to find hidden drain leaks and faults.
- [Commercial Drains](https://waterserpent.com.au/commercial-drains.html): Drain cleaning and maintenance for businesses.
- [General Plumbing](https://waterserpent.com.au/general-plumbing.html): General plumbing repairs and maintenance.

## Service Areas

- [Service Suburbs](https://waterserpent.com.au/service-suburbs.html): Full list of 45+ suburbs across Melbourne's outer east, the Dandenong Ranges and the Yarra Valley — including Ferntree Gully, Healesville, Monbulk, Belgrave, Lilydale, Croydon, Mooroolbark, Ringwood, Boronia, Kilsyth, Wantirna, Chirnside Park and Mount Evelyn.

## Contact

- Phone: 0425 226 636 — 24/7 for emergencies; standard bookings Monday–Saturday, 7am–6pm.
- Email: waterserpentworks@gmail.com
- Base: Kalorama, VIC 3766. Service-area business — we come to you across Melbourne's outer east, the Dandenong Ranges and the Yarra Valley.
